# MCP Weather Server Units Test
# Tests different unit systems for weather data

# Build the weather server binary
go build -o mcp-weather-server .

# Set API key for tests
env OPENWEATHER_API_KEY=test_api_key_123

# Test metric units (Celsius, m/s, etc.)
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"London","units":"metric"}},"id":2}
EOF

# Since we're using a test API key, expect error but verify the request was formed
stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test imperial units (Fahrenheit, mph, etc.)
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"New York","units":"imperial"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test kelvin units (scientific)
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Tokyo","units":"kelvin"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test default units (should be metric when not specified)
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Berlin"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test metric units for forecast
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_weather_forecast","arguments":{"location":"Paris","units":"metric"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting weather forecast'

# Test imperial units for forecast
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_weather_forecast","arguments":{"location":"Los Angeles","units":"imperial"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting weather forecast'

# Test kelvin units for forecast
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_weather_forecast","arguments":{"location":"Moscow","units":"kelvin"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting weather forecast'

# Test case insensitive units (should be handled by API)
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Sydney","units":"METRIC"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test with mixed case units
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Toronto","units":"Imperial"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test invalid units (should still pass but may cause API error)
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Rome","units":"invalid_unit"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test empty units string (should use default)
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Madrid","units":""}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test switching units between calls
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Vienna","units":"metric"}},"id":2}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Vienna","units":"imperial"}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Vienna","units":"kelvin"}},"id":4}
EOF

# All should fail with test API key but verify requests are made
stdout '"isError":true'
